title: schema.json v2 breaks all v1 vector validation
description: Recent edit set format_version const to 2 and added ccp15_vector/ccp_load_balancing_vector to oneOf. Existing test/vectors/*.json all use format_version:1 (schc_compression.json, ccp_tdma.json, rpl_messages.json etc). python/tests/test_vectors.py:test_vector_file_schema uses Draft7Validator(schema) and asserts ==1 in _*_cases(). generate.py:FORMAT_VERSION=1. This is P0 correctness break per test integrity rules. Also new vector schemas are stub-like with additionalProperties:true only. See test/vectors/schema.json:8,23-24,580-597.
